def: A many-sided shape where all sides are the same length and all corners match.
example: A stop sign has 8 equal sides, so it is a regular polygon.

def: A closed flat shape made of straight sides only.
example: A triangle and a square are both a polygon.

def: To break a shape into smaller, easier shapes.
example: We can break a hexagon into 6 triangles to make it simpler.

def: The amount of flat space inside the shape, measured in square units.
example: Adding up all the small triangles gives a total area of 24 square cm.
